name: Path Traversal: '\dir\..\filename'
description: The product does not properly neutralize '\dir\..\filename' sequences using Windows backslash separators in user-supplied pathnames, allowing traversal outside restricted directories.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides path data containing '\dir\..\' backslash traversal sequences that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node normalizing separators and performing path canonicalization with directory containment checks
